{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lirin's mother
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's mother]] has red eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
